quotes.text: You can't trust code that you did not totally create yourself.
quotes.author: Ken Thompson
quotes.source: Reflections on Trusting Trust, 1984 Turing Award Lecture

quotes.text: Your SaaS should have a status page that's always up to date. When it's down, your status page is the only thing users trust.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to build a great team is to hire people who are smarter than you and get out of their way.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your remote team's culture is defined by what happens when nobody's watching. Build trust, not surveillance.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to build trust is to be consistent. Consistency compounds like interest.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your team should be able to ship without permission. Give them autonomy. They'll surprise you.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to build trust is to be honest. Even when it hurts.
quotes.author: based
